tool_summary: Monday CRM is a fully customizable CRM built on top of the monday.com Work OS platform, designed to help sales teams manage their entire sales cycle from lead capture to post-sale account management. It combines no-code automation, AI-powered features, and deep workflow customization to centralize customer data, automate repetitive sales tasks, and provide real-time pipeline visibility. Its core value proposition is a flexible, intuitive CRM that adapts to any sales process without requiring technical expertise.
key_features_raw: Customizable sales pipelines with drag-and-drop interface
AI-powered email composer for personalized sales emails
AI-generated task and activity summaries
Lead scoring and lead management
Contact and account management with unified customer view
No-code workflow automations (e.g., auto-assign leads, trigger notifications, move deals between stages)
Email sync and tracking (Gmail, Outlook) with open/click notifications
Built-in email templates
Mass email campaigns and tracking
Activity tracking and logging (calls, meetings, notes)
Sales forecasting and revenue tracking
Customizable dashboards and real-time reporting
Quote and invoice generation
Post-sale account management and customer onboarding tracking
Two-way integrations with popular tools via native connectors and API
Document management and file sharing within deals
Mobile app for on-the-go CRM access
Merge duplicate data and data enrichment capabilities
Custom fields, formulas, and columns for any data type
Team collaboration features (comments, mentions, updates within items)
Goal tracking and quota management
Pre-built CRM templates for quick setup
AI assistant (monday AI) for generating content, summarizing updates, and suggesting automations
roi_benchmarks: Customers report saving up to 30 hours per month on manual CRM tasks through automations
Claims of 50% faster deal cycle times due to streamlined pipeline management
Users report closing 20% more deals by improving pipeline visibility and follow-up consistency
Average team onboarding time reduced to under 2 hours due to intuitive no-code interface
Up to 80% reduction in time spent on repetitive data entry through automations
Claims of 37% increase in sales productivity when replacing spreadsheets with Monday CRM
186,000+ customers across the monday.com platform globally
